author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Wave 1 complete: 19 critical bug fixes across 21 files. All tests pass. SGD/Muon requires_grad, backward GPU-aware, broadcast grad reduction, checkpoint backward, data_mut unsafe, derive macro, optimizer weight decay, Adam AMSGrad, scheduler per-epoch, memory guard, module cache, cuBLAS overflow, FlashAttention validation, grid overflow, ResNet train/eval.
